name: Queue Manager & Rope Post
shortDescription: Stainless steel rope-and-post barrier for queue management and access control.
longDescription: A stainless steel post-and-ribbon barrier for managing queues at visitor entry points, or marking restricted-access lines around sensitive equipment or VIP areas. Polished or gold finish for a presentable, non-industrial appearance in reception and lobby settings.

images.alt: Queue Manager & Rope Post supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara
